framework.name: CFCS Cloud Security Guidance
framework.scope: Security guidance for Danish organizations adopting cloud services
framework.structure_description: Guidance organized by cloud security domains: risk assessment, identity and access management, configuration security, monitoring and logging, vendor management, and incident preparedness.

controls.title: Risk assessment before cloud adoption
controls.description: The organization must conduct a risk assessment before cloud migration that identifies data, systems, and dependencies being moved.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal gennemfoere en risikovurdering foer migration til cloud der identificerer data, systemer og afhaengigheder der flyttes.
controls.implementation_guidance: Klassificer data der flyttes til cloud. Vurder risici ved dataplacering, jurisdiktion og leverandoerafhaengighed.

controls.title: Data classification in cloud
controls.description: Data in the cloud environment must be classified and handled in accordance with the organization information classification policy.
controls.description_nl: Data i cloudmiljoeet skal klassificeres og behandles i henhold til organisationens informationsklassifikationspolitik.

controls.title: Assessment of data location and jurisdiction
controls.description: The organization must assess in which countries data is stored and processed, and ensure this complies with applicable legislation.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal vurdere i hvilke lande data opbevares og behandles, og sikre at dette er i overensstemmelse med gaeldende lovgivning.
controls.implementation_guidance: Vurder EU/EOS-dataplacering. For statslige myndigheder: overhold Sikkerhedscirkul aerets krav til klassificeret information.

controls.title: Cloud identity management
controls.description: The organization must implement centralized identity management for cloud services with single sign-on and multi-factor authentication.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal implementere centraliseret identitetsstyring for cloud-tjenester med single sign-on og flerfaktorautentifikation.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend foedereret identitetsstyring via SAML eller OpenID Connect. Krav MFA for alle cloud-konti.

controls.title: Privileged cloud access
controls.description: Administrative accounts in the cloud environment must be protected with phishing-resistant MFA, time-limited access, and session monitoring.
controls.description_nl: Administrative konti i cloudmiljoeet skal beskyttes med phishing-resistent MFA, tidsbegraenset adgang og sessionovervagning.

controls.title: Security for API keys and secrets
controls.description: API keys, access tokens, and secrets must be stored in a dedicated secrets vault and rotated regularly.
controls.description_nl: API-noegler, adgangstokens og hemmeligheder skal opbevares i en dedikeret hemmeligheds-vault og roteres regelmaeessigt.

controls.title: Secure cloud configuration
controls.description: Cloud resources must be configured in accordance with the vendor security recommendations and CIS Cloud Benchmarks.
controls.description_nl: Cloud-ressourcer skal konfigureres i henhold til leverandoerens sikkerhedsanbefalinger og CIS Cloud Benchmarks.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend infrastructure-as-code med sikkerhedsscanning. Gennemga konfigurationen med Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM).

controls.title: Network security in cloud
controls.description: Cloud networks must be configured with least-privilege security groups, network ACLs, and private network connectivity where possible.
controls.description_nl: Cloud-netvaerk skal konfigureres med mindste-privilegium sikkerhedsgrupper, netvaerks-ACLer og privat netvaerksforbindelse hvor muligt.

controls.title: Encryption in cloud environment
controls.description: All data in the cloud environment must be encrypted both in transit and at rest. The organization must retain control over encryption keys.
controls.description_nl: Alle data i cloudmiljoeet skal krypteres bade i transit og i hvile. Organisationen skal bevare kontrol over krypteringsnoegler.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend customer-managed keys (CMK) for folsomme data. Opbevar master-noegler i organisationens egen key vault.

controls.title: Cloud storage security
controls.description: Cloud storage (S3 buckets, blob storage) must be configured with blocked public access, versioning, and access logging.
controls.description_nl: Cloud-lagring (S3-buckets, blob storage) skal konfigureres med blokeret offentlig adgang, versionering og adgangslogning.

controls.title: Cloud audit logging
controls.description: All administrative actions, access events, and configuration changes in cloud must be logged in a central and protected log archive.
controls.description_nl: Alle administrative handlinger, adgangshaendelser og konfigurationsaendringer i cloud skal logges i et centralt og beskyttet logarkiv.
controls.implementation_guidance: Aktiver cloud-leverandoerens audit trail (CloudTrail, Activity Log). Eksporter logs til eksternt SIEM.

controls.title: Monitoring of cloud expenses and resources
controls.description: Cloud expenses and resource consumption must be monitored to detect unauthorized use such as cryptomining.
controls.description_nl: Cloud-udgifter og ressourceforbrug skal overvaages for at detektere uautoriseret brug sasom cryptomining.

controls.title: Cloud threat detection
controls.description: The organization must enable the cloud vendor threat detection services and integrate alerts with the organization security monitoring.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal aktivere cloud-leverandoerens trusseldetekteringstjenester og integrere alarmer med organisationens sikkerhedsovervagning.

controls.title: Cloud vendor agreement and SLA
controls.description: The agreement with the cloud vendor must specify security requirements, data protection, incident reporting, audit access, and exit strategy.
controls.description_nl: Aftalen med cloud-leverandoeren skal specificere sikkerhedskrav, databeskyttelse, incidentrapportering, auditadgang og exit-strategi.
controls.implementation_guidance: Krav til SOC 2 Type II eller ISO 27001-certificering hos leverandoeren. Definer RTO/RPO i SLA.

controls.title: Cloud exit strategy
controls.description: The organization must have a documented exit strategy for cloud services that ensures data can be migrated or deleted at contract termination.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en dokumenteret exit-strategi for cloud-tjenester der sikrer data kan migreres eller slettes ved kontraktophoer.

controls.title: Audit of cloud vendor security
controls.description: The cloud vendor security must be audited regularly based on independent audit reports and certifications.
controls.description_nl: Cloud-leverandoerens sikkerhed skal revideres regelmaeessigt baseret pa uafhaengige revisionsrapporter og certificeringer.

controls.title: Cloud incident response plan
controls.description: The incident response plan must address cloud-specific scenarios including vendor outage, data breach, and account compromise.
controls.description_nl: Haendelsesresponsplanen skal adressere cloud-specifikke scenarier inklusiv leverandoernedbrud, databrud og kontokompromittering.

controls.title: Cloud forensic capability
controls.description: The organization must ensure that cloud log data and snapshots are available for forensic investigation after a security incident.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal sikre at cloud-logdata og snapshots er tilgaengelige for forensisk undersogelse efter en sikkerhedshaendelse.

controls.title: Cloud backup and recovery
controls.description: Critical data in cloud must be backed up independently of the cloud vendor with regular recovery testing.
controls.description_nl: Kritiske data i cloud skal sikkerhedskopieres uafhaengigt af cloud-leverandoeren med regelmaeessig test af gendannelse.
